sentiment.summary: Markets surging as Trump signals US forces exit Iran in 2-3 weeks, VIX collapses 17%, and all major indexes push higher on geopolitical relief.

insights.text: War-end rally ignites Wall Street. Trump says US forces leaving Iran in 2-3 weeks, VIX collapses 17%, all three indexes surge 1-2%. Oil steady at $103 gives inflation fears a breather. Risk-on mode — stay aggressive.

BTC holding but still underwater. Trading ~$68,200, below your $73,135 cost basis. Up +0.8% today on war-risk easing. Needs a macro catalyst to recover — watch NFP Friday and geopolitical developments closely.

RKLB back above cost basis — momentum building. At $67 vs your $62.04 entry. Mynaric acquisition adds optical comms edge, defense contracts stacking up. Analyst avg target $90. This one still has serious legs.

SATS added to S&P 500 Equal Weighted Index — momentum real. Trading $122.58, above your $114.33 basis. SpaceX/Starlink partnership replaces defunct direct-to-device project. Analyst target $130. Trending well.

TE bleeding — down 2.4% today, well below your $6.73 basis. Printing at $4.61. Despite 2.79 GW solar output and $440M capital raise, market isn't buying the story yet. EBITDA milestone pushed to 2027. Patience required.

STX hit hard by Alphabet compression fears. Trading ~$353 vs your $448.98 basis — a painful -21% loss. Alphabet's new data compression tech rattled memory stocks. AI/data center growth remains intact but near-term pain is real.

TSAT quietly climbing above your basis. Around $36 vs your $33.33 entry. Deutsche Bank raised target to $37. Military Ka-band added to Lightspeed constellation adds defense revenue. Named top tech pick late March.

BBAI deep in the red — dilution looming. At $3.55 vs your $9.02 cost basis, down 61%. Proposed share increase raises dilution risk. Revenue growth anticipated but profitability is distant. Weak near-term setup.

NBIS Meta deal is a game-changer — stay long. At ~$102 vs your $131.12 basis but thesis is intact. Meta's $27B AI commitment + Nvidia's $2B investment signal massive institutional conviction. Analyst target $167.

OKLO massively underwater — patience or pain. At $51.33 vs your $125 basis, down from a $193 peak. DOE isotope facility approval is good news but Aurora reactors are years from revenue. Long-term speculative hold only.

NVTS below cost basis — AI pivot is the thesis. At $7.72 vs your $10 entry. Transitioning from mobile to GaN/SiC for AI data centers, with sequential margin improvement expected from Q1 2026. Earnings May 7 is key catalyst.
